---
title: "watcher.ts"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\pennyone\live\watcher.ts"
loc: 55
complexity: 8
logic_score: 5.25
style_score: 3.87
intel_score: 8.55
overall_score: 5.00
---

## Intent
The `watcher.ts` module implements the 'Repository Watcher' logic. It uses Chokidar to monitor the filesystem for changes and triggers incremental scans and matrix re-compilations to ensure that the neural graph remains a real-time reflection of the physical codebase.

## Interaction Protocol
Start the monitoring process by calling the `startWatcher` function. It requires a `SubspaceRelay` instance to broadcast updates to connected visualizers when file changes are detected.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.5/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 21 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://chokidar)
- [*](file://path)
- [runScan](file://../index.ts)
- [compileMatrix](file://../intel/compiler.ts)
- [SubspaceRelay](file://./socket.ts)
- [*](file://chalk)
- [activePersona](file://../personaRegistry.ts)

### Exports
- `startWatcher`
- `startWatcher`
- `watcher`
- `scanTimer`
- `rebuildTimer`
- `results`
- `data`
- `rebuild`
- `results`
